message.content:
@startuml
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam linetype ortho

package "php" {
  package "SPL" {
    interface "ArrayAccess" as SPL_ArrayAccess {
      +offsetExists(offset)
      +offsetGet(offset)
      +offsetSet(offset, value)
      +offsetUnset(offset)
    }

    interface "Countable" as SPL_Countable {
      +count()
    }

    interface "Iterator" as SPL_Iterator {
      +current()
      +next()
      +key()
      +valid()
      +rewind()
    }

    class "SplFixedArray" as SPL_SplFixedArray
  }
}

package "Digitick" {
  package "Foundation" {
    package "Collection" {

      interface "InterfaceCollection" as IF_Collection {
        +addAll(InterfaceCollection elementCollection)
        +clear()
        +contains(element)
        +containsAll(InterfaceCollection elementCollection)
        +isEmpty()
        +removeAll(interfaceCollection elementCollection)
        +size()
        +toArray()
      }

      interface "InterfaceSet" as IF_Set {
        +add(element)
        +get(element)
        +remove(element)
      }

      abstract class "TraitCollection" as TR_Collection << (A,#BFEFFF) >> {
        -indexOf(element, collectionObject)
        -contains(element, collectionObject)
      }

      interface "InterfaceList" as IF_List {
        +add(offset, element)
        +remove(offset)
        +get(offset)
        +set(offset, element)
        +indexOf(element)
        +subList(fromIndex, toIndex)
      }

      abstract class "AbstractScalarSet" as ABS_ScalarSet << (A,#BFEFFF) >> {
        #DEFAULT_SIZE
        #nextAvailableOffset
        #storageArray
        #increaseSize(quantity=1)
        #decreaseSize(quantity=1)
        #shift(fromOffset)
        #removeOffset(offset)
      }

      abstract class "AbstractObjectSet" as ABS_ObjectSet << (A,#BFEFFF) >> {
        #storageArray
        #nextAvailableOffset
        #set(element, data)
      }

      abstract class "TraitTypedCollection" as TR_TypedCollection << (A,#BFEFFF) >> {
        #CLASSORTYPENAME
        -checkelementType(element)
      }

      abstract class "AbstractList" as ABS_List << (A,#BFEFFF) >>

      abstract class "AbstractTypedScalarSet" as ABS_TypedScalarSet << (A,#BFEFFF) >>
      class "BaseScalarSet" as BaseScalarSet << (C,#CFEFCF) >>
      class "IntScalarSet" as IntScalarSet << (C,#CFEFCF) >>
      class "StringScalarSet" as StringScalarSet << (C,#CFEFCF) >>

      class "BaseObjectSet" as BaseObjectSet << (C,#CFEFCF) >>

      abstract class "AbstractTypedObjectSet" as ABS_TypedObjectSet << (A,#BFEFFF) >>

      abstract class "AbstractTypedList" as ABS_TypedList << (A,#BFEFFF) >>
      class "BaseList" as BaseList << (C,#CFEFCF) >>
      class "IntList" as IntList << (C,#CFEFCF) >>
      class "StringList" as StringList << (C,#CFEFCF) >>
    }
  }
}

' Inheritance / realization inside Digitick
IF_Set -|> IF_Collection
IF_List -|> IF_Collection

ABS_ScalarSet -|> IF_Set
ABS_ObjectSet -|> IF_Set

BaseScalarSet -|> ABS_ScalarSet
IntScalarSet -|> ABS_ScalarSet
StringScalarSet -|> ABS_ScalarSet
ABS_TypedScalarSet -|> ABS_ScalarSet

BaseObjectSet -|> ABS_ObjectSet

ABS_TypedObjectSet -|> TR_TypedCollection
ABS_TypedList -|> TR_TypedCollection

ABS_List -|> IF_List
ABS_TypedList -|> ABS_List
BaseList -|> ABS_List

IntList -|> ABS_TypedList
StringList -|> ABS_TypedList

TR_Collection -|> IF_Collection

' SPL relations to Digitick
IF_Collection -|> SPL_Countable
IF_Collection -|> SPL_Iterator
ABS_List -|> SPL_ArrayAccess

SPL_SplFixedArray -|> SPL_Iterator
@enduml
